出る.gloss: to come out, to appear, to leave

わかる.gloss: to understand, to know (UniDic 分かる)

探す.gloss: to look for, to search (UniDic 探す)

おく.gloss: to put, to place (UniDic 置く)

みつかる.gloss: to be found (passive-intransitive of みつける, ch07)

かくれる.gloss: to hide (oneself) — previewed here; foregrounded in ch12

寝る.gloss: to sleep, to go to bed

子.gloss: child; suffix: おんなの子 = 'girl', おとこの子 = 'boy'

度.gloss: time, occurrence (counter: 一度 = once, 二度 = twice)

違う.gloss: to differ, to be different, to be wrong

下さる.gloss: to give (keigo — upward politeness — Moominmamma's register)

ほう.gloss: direction, side (山のほう = 'the mountain direction')

風船.gloss: balloon (a drifting puffy thing in the sky)

こちら.gloss: this way, this side (polite form of こっち)

きのこ.gloss: mushroom (UniDic きのこ → learner hiragana きのこ)

出す.gloss: to put out, to bring out

起きる.gloss: to wake up, to get up

いう.gloss: to say (UniDic 言う → hiragana いう)

知れる.gloss: to become known (mainly in 〜かもしれない)

つもり.gloss: intention; plan to (V-dict + つもり = 'intend to V')

あがる.gloss: to go up, to rise (UniDic 上がる)

いらっしゃる.gloss: honorific for いる / くる / いく

所為.gloss: cause, fault (Xのせいで = 'because of X'; normally written hiragana せい)

とまる.gloss: to stop, to stay (at a place)

いる.gloss: to be, to exist (animate); to stay

かぶる.gloss: to wear (on the head), to put on (a hat)

しまう.gloss: to finish; (auxiliary) to end up V-ing

あらあら.gloss: oh dear, oh my (soft motherly interjection)

気.gloss: spirit, mind, feeling (気になる, 気がつく…)

つく.gloss: to arrive; to stick; to turn on (light)

眺める.gloss: to gaze at, to look out over

宜しく.gloss: please (treat me well); nice to meet you

聞こえる.gloss: to be heard, to be audible

見る.gloss: to see, to look at, to watch

ずっと.gloss: all along; much more; far away

漸と.gloss: finally, at last (normally written hiragana やっと)

其々.gloss: each, respectively (normally written hiragana それぞれ)

確り.gloss: firmly, properly (normally written hiragana しっかり)

先ず.gloss: first of all (normally written hiragana まず)

暫く.gloss: for a while (normally written hiragana しばらく)

助かる.gloss: to be saved, to be helped (intransitive)

ほっと.gloss: with relief (ほっとする = 'to feel relieved')

昔.gloss: long ago, in the old days

立てる.gloss: to stand (something) up; to pitch (a tent)

黙る.gloss: to fall silent, to shut up

できる.gloss: to be able to; to be completed

仕方無い.gloss: can't be helped; it can't be helped

思い思い.gloss: each as they please, in their own way

嘗て.gloss: once, formerly (normally written hiragana かつて)

或る.gloss: a certain (一人の or その意味で)

侭.gloss: as (it) is; while remaining (normally written hiragana まま)

立ち止まる.gloss: to come to a halt, to stand still

些とも.gloss: (not) in the slightest (normally written hiragana ちっとも)

軈て.gloss: soon, eventually (normally written hiragana やがて)

揃う.gloss: to be all present, to be gathered

覚ます.gloss: to wake up (目を覚ます = 'to awaken')

出でる.gloss: to come out (literary variant of 出る)

大した.gloss: significant; (+ neg) not much of a…

振り返る.gloss: to turn around and look back

見詰める.gloss: to gaze at, to stare at

為.gloss: for the sake of; because of

丁度.gloss: just, exactly (normally written hiragana ちょうど)

可笑しい.gloss: funny; strange (normally written hiragana おかしい)

困る.gloss: to be troubled, to be at a loss

並ぶ.gloss: to line up, to stand in a row

飛ばす.gloss: to send flying, to blow away (transitive)

つける.gloss: to attach; to turn on (a light)

ぶつける.gloss: to bump (something) against; to throw at

御免.gloss: sorry; excuse me (normally written hiragana ごめん)

升.gloss: (UniDic stray parse of the ます polite auxiliary)

空く.gloss: to become empty, to open up

如何.gloss: how; how about? (polite; normally written hiragana いかが)

通る.gloss: to pass through, to go along

喜ぶ.gloss: to be delighted, to be glad

かける.gloss: to hang; to set (a table); to put on (glasses)

合う.gloss: to match, to fit; to be together

張り切る.gloss: to be in high spirits, to be fired up

利く.gloss: to work, to be effective (気が利く…)

解ける.gloss: to come undone (of a knot); to be solved

成る程.gloss: I see, indeed (normally written hiragana なるほど)

頑張る.gloss: to do one's best, to hang in there

態と.gloss: on purpose (normally written hiragana わざと)

濁る.gloss: to become muddy, to turn cloudy

斯く.gloss: thus, in this way (normally written hiragana こう)

たつ.gloss: to stand; to elapse (of time) — UniDic 経つ/立つ

吐く.gloss: to breathe out; to spit out

書き込む.gloss: to write in, to jot down

流す.gloss: to let flow; to wash away

じろ.gloss: (じろっと) with a sharp stare

仮令.gloss: even if (normally written hiragana たとえ)

駆け出す.gloss: to break into a run, to dash off

凝らす.gloss: to concentrate (目を凝らす = 'to strain one's eyes')

浮かぶ.gloss: to float; to come to mind

間違える.gloss: to make a mistake, to mix up

引っ掛かる.gloss: to get caught on; to snag

昔々.gloss: long long ago (once upon a time)

染まる.gloss: to be dyed; to become tinged
